package repository

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

type UserFilter struct {
	Active *bool
}

type UserRepository struct {
	db *sql.DB
}

func (r *UserRepository) Save(ctx context.Context, filter UserFilter) error {
	var active any
	if filter.Active != nil {
		active = *filter.Active
	}

	_, err := r.db.ExecContext(ctx, "UPDATE users SET active = ?", active)
	return err
}
